NAVAREA XIX 55/16
ANDOYA TEST CENTER CONDUCT TESTING AND EXERCISE WITH MILITARY SYSTEMS OUTSIDE ANDOEYA. TIME PERIOD FROM JUNE 13TH TO JUNE 18TH 2016. TESTING AND EXERCISE WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 2200 AND 0500 LOCAL TIME. GUARD VESSELS IN AREA.

DANGER AREA 1:
A SECTOR WITH ORIGO IN COORDINATE: N69-17.7 E16-01.5
HEADING 315-340 DEGREES. SECTOR LENGTH 6.1NM
